Angela Galuppo is a Canadian film, television and voice actress. She is best known as the frontlady of the Montreal-based band St. Ange, and for her recurring role as Bridget in the television series Being Human as well as providing the voice of Claudia Auditore da Firenze in the Assassin's Creed video games.

Galuppo's other voice acting credits include Winx Club as Bloom in the 4th season made by Cinelume, Fishtronaut as Marina and The Mysteries of Alfred Hedgehog as Milo. She has also appeared in a number of films including Living With the Enemy (2005), I'm Not There (2007), Picture This (2008), The Trotsky (2009), The Smurfs 2 (2013) and Snowtime! (2015), and the television series The Dead Zone, Naked Josh, The Foundation, The Business and Against the Wall. She also voices Mei in the game I Am Alive.

data.biography:
Henry Burk Jones (August 1, 1912 – May 17, 1999) was an American actor of stage, film and television.

Jones was born in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, the son of Helen (née Burk) and John Francis Xavier Jones. He was the grandson of Pennsylvania Representative Henry Burk. He attended the Jesuit-run Saint Joseph's Preparatory School.

Jones is remembered for his role as handyman Leroy Jessup in the movie The Bad Seed (1956), a role he originated on Broadway. Other theatre credits included My Sister Eileen, Hamlet, The Time of Your Life, They Knew What They Wanted, The Solid Gold Cadillac, and Sunrise at Campobello, for which he won the Tony Award for Best Performance by a Featured Actor in a Play, and the Outer Critics Circle Award for Performance in a Drama.

Jones appeared in more than 180 movies and television shows. His screen credits included The Girl Can't Help It, 3:10 to Yuma, Will Success Spoil Rock Hunter?, Vertigo, Cash McCall, The Bramble Bush, Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid, Dirty Dingus Magee, Support Your Local Gunfighter, and Arachnophobia.

On television, Jones appeared in Appointment with Adventure, Alfred Hitchcock Presents, The Eleventh Hour, Channing, Phyllis, Night Gallery, Emergency!, Gunsmoke, The Twilight Zone, and The George Burns and Gracie Allen Show. He played Dr. Smith's cousin in a 1966 episode of Lost In Space, "Curse Of Cousin Smith," great acting by Henry, and R.J. Hoferkamp in the 1968 made-for-television western movie Something for a Lonely Man.

Jones died in Los Angeles, California, at age 86, from complications from injuries suffered in a fall.

data.biography:
Henry Jones (1 de agosto de 1912 – 17 de mayo de 1999) fue un actor teatral, cinematográfico y estadounidense.

Su nombre completo era Henry Burk Jones, y nació en Filadelfia, Pensilvania. Sus padres eran Helen Burk y John Francis Xavier Jones, y su abuelo fue Henry Burk, componente de la Cámara de Representantes de los Estados Unidos elegido por Pensilvania. Jones estudió en la Saint Joseph's Preparatory School, centro regido por la Compañía de Jesús.

Jones es recordado por su papel del manitas Leroy Jessup en la película La mala semilla (1956), un papel que él interpretó en el circuito de Broadway. Otros de sus trabajos teatrales tuvieron lugar en las obras My Sister Eileen, Hamlet, El momento de tu vida, They Knew What They Wanted, The Solid Gold Cadillac, y Sunrise at Campobello, actuación por la cual ganó un Premio Tony.

Jones actuó en más de 180 películas y programas televisivos. Entre sus trabajos para el cine figuran The Girl Can't Help It, 3:10 to Yuma, Will Success Spoil Rock Hunter? (Una mujer de cuidado), Vertigo, Cash McCall (El potentado), The Bramble Bush (El zarzal), Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid, Dirty Dingus Magee, Support Your Local Gunfighter (Látigo), y Arachnophobia (Aracnofobia).

Para la televisión, Jones actuó en las series Alfred Hitchcock Presents, The Eleventh Hour, Channing, Phyllis, Galería Nocturna, Emergency!, Gunsmoke, Dimensión Desconocida, y The George Burns and Gracie Allen Show. Además, fue el primo del Dr. Smith en un episodio de 1966 de la serie Perdidos en el Espacio, "Curse Of Cousin Smith," y tuvo una gran actuación junto a R.J. Hoferkamp en el telefilm de 1968 de género western Something for a Lonely Man.

Henry Jones falleció a causa de las complicaciones surgidas tras sufrir una caída en Los Ángeles, California, en 1999. Tenía 86 años de edad.

Henry Burk Jones (* 1. August 1912 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania; † 17. Mai 1999 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) war ein amerikanischer Schauspieler, der meist unsympathische Nebenfiguren verkörperte und im Laufe seiner langen Karriere als Charakterdarsteller mit dem Tony Award ausgezeichnet wurde.

Der College-Absolvent Henry Jones gab sein Schauspieldebüt 1938 am Broadway als Reynaldo in Hamlet. Nach Absolvierung seines Militärdienstes im Zweiten Weltkrieg setzte er sich mit der Rolle des ermordeten Handwerkers in The Bad Seed als Schauspieler durch. 1958 wurde Jones mit dem Tony Award als bester Darsteller für diese Rolle geehrt. Bereits zuvor hatte Jones die Rolle auch in der Filmfassung von 1955 gespielt, mit der er sich im Filmgeschäft etablierte – seit Anfang der 1940er hatte er nur vereinzelte Film- und Fernsehauftritte gehabt, sich jedoch dort nicht dauerhaft durchsetzen können. Es folgte eine lange und abwechslungsreiche Karriere bei Film, Fernsehen und Theater. 1961 verließ er die Bühne und konzentrierte sich nur noch auf die Filmarbeit.

Meist verkörperte Jones unsympathische und harte, gelegentlich auch erschreckende Charaktere in der zweiten Reihe. Eines der bekanntesten Beispiele dafür ist die Rolle des unerbittlichen Coroners im Hitchcock-Thriller Vertigo – Aus dem Reich der Toten, der James Stewart in einem langen Monolog die Schuld am Tod seiner Geliebten gibt. Nur in kleineren Filmen übernahm er größere Aufgaben. Jones arbeitete in rund 150 Filmen mit und arbeitete mit Regisseuren wie Alfred Hitchcock, Mervyn LeRoy, Claude Chabrol, Burt Kennedy, George Roy Hill, Sidney Lumet und Stephen Frears. Im Fernsehen war Jones seit Ende der 1940er-Jahre unter anderen in folgenden Serien zu sehen gewesen: Solo für O.N.C.E.L., Bonanza, Rauchende Colts, Vegas, Quincy, Love Boat, Falcon Crest, MacGyver, Magnum und Mord ist ihr Hobby. Erst 1995 hatte er seine letzte Fernsehrolle.

data.biography:
Masaaki Mizunaka (水中 雅章, Mizunaka Masaaki) es un actor de voz (seiyuu) japonés nacido el 20 de enero de 1990 en Iwakuni, prefectura de Yamaguchi. Desde pequeño soñaba con trabajar en un zoológico, pero su vocación cambió al quedar fascinado por el doblaje de la serie estadounidense Full House, especialmente por la interpretación de Hochu Otsuka. Este descubrimiento lo llevó a estudiar en la sede de Hiroshima de la Yoyogi Animation Academy, donde comenzó a forjar su carrera como seiyuu.

Debutó profesionalmente en 2014 y desde entonces ha prestado su voz a una amplia variedad de personajes en anime, videojuegos y doblajes. Su primer papel protagonista llegó en 2018 con el personaje de Diablo en Isekai Maou to Shoukan Shoujo no Dorei Majutsu, donde demostró una notable capacidad para alternar registros vocales sin necesidad de cortes en la grabación. También ha destacado como Keisuke Baji en Tokyo Revengers, Ryuen Sho en Classroom of the Elite, y Poncho Panacotta en How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom.

Está representado por la agencia Production Baobab y es conocido por su versatilidad vocal y energía interpretativa. En lo personal, es el segundo de cuatro hermanos, habla el dialecto de Yamaguchi, y tiene como aficiones el baloncesto (fue capitán en su etapa escolar), ver programas de humor y explorar caminos desconocidos a pie.

Sharon Washington is an American playwright as well as a stage, TV, film, and voice actress. She received her MFA from the Yale School of Drama and her BA from Dartmouth College.

She got her start doing soap operas such as the 1996 season of "One Life to Live" in addition to having a recurring role on the mini-series follow-up "Heaven & Earth: North & South, Book III".

She has had guest star appearances in TV series including Power Book III: Raising Kanan, and in the final season of Madam Secretary. She’s also had recurring roles in For Life, City On A Hill, The Code, Gotham, Law & Order: SVU, and Damages.

Other television credits include the Hulu series The Looming Tower, Blue Bloods, The Blacklist, Golden Boy, White Collar, Royal Pains, NYC 22, Law & Order and Law & Order: CI. She has appeared in numerous television commercials both on-camera and voice-over and is an accomplished audiobook and documentary film narrator.

She played Lena in the webseries Hustling for which she was awarded an Indie Series award for Best Supporting Actress (2015).  Her film appearances include Joker, The Bourne Legacy, Michael Clayton, Wiener Dog, Rocksteady, Taking Chance, Freedomland, The School of Rock, Half Nelson, The Long Kiss Goodnight, Malcolm X, and Die Hard With A Vengeance. She also appeared in the short film Approaching A Breakthrough, directed by Noah Pritzker, which premiered at the 2017 Tribeca Film Festival. 

She is the narrator of several documentary series for Animal Planet, Discovery, NOVA and TV One. She has also narrated a diverse range of PBS, Nova, National Geographic, and Discovery Channel programs. She voiced different characters in two installments of the successful Grand Theft Auto video game saga.

She added playwright to her resumé, writing and performing her solo play Feeding The Dragon which received it’s world premiere at City Theatre in Pittsburgh followed by a production at Hartford Stage and from there to a successful run Off-Broadway at Primary Stages at the Cherry Lane Theater in the Spring of 2018 where she was nominated for an Outer Critics Circle Award for Outstanding Solo Performance, a Lucille Lortel Award for Outstanding Solo Show and won an Audelco Award for Solo Performance.

On Broadway, she appeared as The Lady in the critically-acclaimed The Scottsboro Boys musical by Kander & Ebb directed by five-time Tony Award winner Susan Stroman. A role she originated at The Vineyard Theatre and The Guthrie.

Other Off-Broadway credits include roles in Dot at the Vineyard Theatre, written by Colman Domingo and also directed by Susan Stroman; While I Yet Live by Billy Porter at Primary Stages; Luce by JC Lee at Lincoln Center Theater (LCT3); and Wild With Happy also by Colman Domingo at the Public Theater for which she received a Lucille Lortel Award nomination and an Audelco Award.

She has worked many times on the New York Shakespeare Festival stage including playing Lady Anne to Denzel Washington's Richard III and Valeria to Christopher Walken's Coriolanus; as well as in the award-winning adaptation of Caucasian Chalk Circle directed by George C. Wolfe and Stuff Happens directed by Daniel Sullivan.
data.name: Sharon Washington

data.biography:
莎朗·华盛顿（Sharon Washington）是美国舞台、电视、电影和配音演员。她在耶鲁大学戏剧学院获得艺术硕士学位，在达特茅斯学院获得学士学位。

莎朗开始制作肥皂剧，例如1996年的“One Life to Live”季，此外还在迷你剧后续“Heaven & Earth：North & South，Book III”中反复扮演角色。

她曾在电视剧中客串出演，包括《权力之书III：抚养卡南》，以及《国务卿夫人》最后一季。她还在《For Life》、《City On A Hill》、《The Code》、《Gotham》、《Law & Order： SVU》和《Damages》中反复出演角色。

其他电视作品包括Hulu系列《隐约的塔楼》、《蓝血》、《黑名单》、《金童》、《白领》、《皇家痛苦》、《纽约22》、《法律与秩序》和《法律与秩序：CI》。她曾出现在许多电视广告中，包括镜头前和画外音，是一位多才多艺的有声读物和纪录片叙述者。

莎朗在网络连续剧《喧嚣》中饰演莉娜，她因此获得了独立剧集最佳女配角奖（2015）。她出演的电影包括《小丑》、《伯恩遗产》、《迈克尔·克莱顿》、《维也纳狗》、《摇滚》、《抓住机会》、《自由之地》、《摇滚学校》、《半尼尔森》、《长吻晚安》、《马尔科姆X》和《虎胆龙威》。她还出演了由诺亚·普利兹克执导的短片《接近突破》，该片在2017年翠贝卡电影节首映。

她是《动物星球》、《发现》、《新星》和《电视一号》的几部纪录片系列的解说员。她还为PBS、Nova、国家地理和探索频道的各种节目配音。她在成功的《侠盗猎车手》视频游戏传奇的两部作品中为不同的角色配音。

莎朗在她的简历中加入了剧作家，她创作并表演了她的独舞剧《喂龙》，该剧在匹兹堡城市剧院进行了世界首演，随后在哈特福德舞台进行了制作，并从那里成功上演了2018年春季在樱桃巷剧院的初级舞台，在那里她被提名为外部评论家圈杰出独奏表演奖，露西尔·洛特尔（Lucille Lortel）杰出个人表演奖，并获得了Audelco个人表演奖。

在百老汇，她出演了由五届托尼奖得主苏珊·斯特罗曼（Susan Stroman）执导的坎德和埃布（Kander & Ebb）广受好评的音乐剧《斯科茨伯勒男孩》（The Scottsboro Boys）。这个角色起源于葡萄园剧院和格思里。

其他非百老汇作品包括由科尔曼·多明戈（Colman Domingo）编剧、苏珊·斯特罗曼（Susan Stroman）执导的《葡萄园剧院的点》（Dot at the Vineyard Theatre）中的角色；《虽然我还生活在初级阶段》的比利·波特（Billy Porter）身边；JC Lee在林肯中心剧院（LCT3）的Luce；科尔曼·多明戈（Colman Domingo）在公共剧院上演的《狂野快乐》（Wild With Happy）也因此获得了露西尔·洛特尔奖提名和奥德尔科奖。

她曾多次在纽约莎士比亚戏剧节的舞台上演出，包括为丹泽尔·华盛顿的《理查三世》扮演安妮夫人，为克里斯托弗·沃肯的《科里奥兰纳斯》扮演瓦莱里娅；以及由乔治·沃尔夫（George C. Wolfe）执导的《白种人粉笔圈》（Caucasian Chalk Circle）和丹尼尔·沙利文（Daniel Sullivan）执导的《事情发生》（Stuff Happens）的获奖改编作品。
data.name: 莎朗·华盛顿

data.biography:
莎朗·華盛頓 （Sharon Washington） 是美國舞台、電視、電影和配音演員。她在耶魯大學戲劇學院獲得藝術碩士學位，在達特茅斯學院獲得學士學位。

莎朗開始製作肥皂劇，例如 1996 年的“One Life to Live”季，此外還在迷你劇後續“Heaven & Earth： North & South， Book III”中反覆扮演角色。

她曾在電視劇中客串出演，包括《權力之書 III：撫養卡南》，以及《國務卿夫人》最後一季。她還在《For Life》、《City On A Hill》、《The Code》、《Gotham》、《Law & Order： SVU》和《Damages》中反覆出演角色。

其他電視作品包括 Hulu 系列《隱約的塔樓》，《藍血》，《黑名單》，《金童》，《白領》，《皇家痛苦》，《紐約 22》，《法律與秩序》和《法律與秩序：CI》。她曾出現在許多電視廣告中，包括鏡頭前和畫外音，是一位多才多藝的有聲讀物和紀錄片敍述者。

莎朗在網絡聯續劇《喧囂》中飾演莉娜，她因此獲得了獨立劇集最佳女配角獎（2015 年）。她出演的電影包括《JOKER 小醜》、《伯恩遺產》、《敵對同謀》、《維也納狗》、《搖滾》、《抓住機會》、《自由之地》、《搖滾學校》、《半尼爾森》、《長吻晚安》、《馬爾科姆 X》和《虎膽龍威》。她還出演了由諾亞·普利茲克執導的短片《接近突破》，該片在 2017 年翠貝卡電影節首映。

她是《動物星球》、《發現》、《新星》和《電視一號》的幾部紀錄片系列的解説員。莎朗在網絡聯續劇《喧囂》中飾演莉娜，她因此獲得了獨立劇集最佳女配角獎（2015 年）。她還為 PBS、Nova、國家地理和探索頻道的各種節目配音。她在成功的《俠盜獵車手》視頻遊戲傳奇的兩部作品中為不同的角色配音。

莎朗在她的簡歷中加入了劇作家，她創作並表演了她的獨舞劇《餵龍》，該劇在匹茲堡城市劇院進行了世界首演，隨後在哈特福德舞台進行了製作，並從那裏成功上演了 2018 年春季在櫻桃巷劇院的初級舞台，在那裏她被提名為外部評論家圈傑出獨奏表演獎， 露西爾·洛特爾（Lucille Lortel）傑出個人表演獎，並獲得了 Audelco 個人表演獎。

在百老匯，她出演了由五屆託尼獎得主蘇珊·斯特羅曼（Susan Stroman）執導的坎德和埃布（Kander & Ebb）廣受好評的音樂劇《斯科茨伯勒男孩》（The Scottsboro Boys）。這個角色起源於葡萄園劇院和格思裏。

其他非百老匯作品包括由科爾曼·多明戈（Colman Domingo）編劇、蘇珊·斯特羅曼（Susan Stroman）執導的《葡萄園劇院的點》（Dot at the Vineyard Theatre）中的角色; 雖然我還生活在初級階段的比利·波特（Billy Porter）身邊; JC Lee 在林肯中心劇院 （LCT3） 的 Luce; 科爾曼·多明戈（Colman Domingo）在公共劇院上演的《狂野快樂》（Wild With Happy）也因此獲得了露西爾·洛特爾獎提名和奧德爾科獎。

她曾多次在紐約莎士比亞戲劇節的舞台上演出，包括為丹澤爾·華盛頓的《理查三世》扮演安妮夫人，為克里斯託弗·沃肯的《英雄叛國記》扮演瓦萊裏婭; 以及由喬治·沃爾夫（George C.Wolfe）執導的《白種人粉筆圈》（Caucasian Chalk Circle）和丹尼爾·沙利文（Daniel Sullivan）執導的《事情發生》（Stuff Happens）的獲獎改編作品。
data.name: 莎朗·華盛頓

data.biography: Pamela Cundell was a renowned comic character actor perhaps best remembered for playing Mrs Fox in Dad's Army.  Her career stretched as far back as 1948 when she appeared in Brighton Rock as a Pierrot artiste. Other film credits included Half a Sixpence, the big screen spin offs of popular 70s sitcoms On the Buses and Love Thy Neighbour, Memoirs of a Survivor, and A Fantastic Fear of Everything. On TV she appeared alongside comics such as Benny Hill and Barry Humphries, and in dramas such as The XYY Man, Minder, Big Deal, The Borrowers, and Doctors. She was married to actor Bill Fraser from 1981 to his death in 1987.
data.name: Pamela Cundell

data.biography:
Géraldine Nakache, née le 16 février 1980 à Puteaux ou Suresnes, est une actrice, scénariste et réalisatrice française. Elle est révélée en 2010 par la comédie Tout ce qui brille, qu'elle coréalise et dont elle tient l'un des rôles principaux.

Géraldine Nakache naît le 16 février 1980 à Suresnes d'un père directeur informatique et d'une mère assistante comptable, tous deux juifs d'Algérie. Elle est la sœur d'Olivier Nakache, coréalisateur des films Intouchables, Nos jours heureux et de la série En thérapie. Elle grandit à Puteaux. Elle est titulaire d'un baccalauréat littéraire.

data.name: ジェラルディン・ナカシュ

data.biography:
A Virginia native, Amanda Christine spoke that she was going to be an actor at the tender age of 3. She worked her very first commercial at the age of 4 for "Cabbage Patch Adoptimals".

Amanda landed the role as Beth Bergom in the television made pilot "The Wilding"; Meli Goodman in the television made pilot "Broken" as well as landing her first national commercial for "Yoplait" where she was infamous for saying the phrase "Mom's the Boss!" Producers of "Mad Families" loved this commercial so much that she was written into the movie where Amanda Christine was afforded the opportunity to work with some of the most respected comedians in the industry.

Next, she made many guest appearances on shows such as NBC's "Red Nose Day Special", "9-1-1", "Colony", "How To Get Away With Murder", "Black-ish" and most recently her love for comedy landed her a guest star role on Disney's "Bunk'd" as Kaylie Champion. She has made appearances in many movies like "Stephanie", "OG", "Miss Virginia".

In 2019, Amanda landed her first lead role her first leading role as Ava in "Black Box." She was thrilled be to a part of an Amazon/Blumhouse Production.

Amanda excels in sports and dance. She plays guard on her school basketball team and dances with her dance troupe when her schedule permits. She loves traveling and spending time with her family and friends.
data.name: Amanda Christine

data.biography:
Die aus Virginia stammende Amanda Christine (* 31. Dezember 2008) sagte bereits im zarten Alter von drei Jahren, dass sie Schauspielerin werden wolle. Mit vier Jahren drehte sie ihren ersten Werbespot für „Cabbage Patch Adoptimals“.

Amanda erhielt die Rolle der Beth Bergom in der Fernsehpilotsendung „The Wilding“; Meli Goodman in der Fernsehpilotsendung „Broken“ und ihren ersten nationalen Werbespot für „Yoplait“, in dem sie mit dem Satz „Mom's the Boss!“ berühmt wurde. Die Produzenten von „Mad Families“ waren von diesem Werbespot so begeistert, dass sie in den Film geschrieben wurde, wo Amanda Christine die Gelegenheit hatte, mit einigen der angesehensten Komikern der Branche zusammenzuarbeiten.

Anschließend hatte sie zahlreiche Gastauftritte in Shows wie NBCs „Red Nose Day Special“, „9-1-1“, „Colony“, „How To Get Away With Murder“, „black-ish“ und zuletzt verschaffte ihr ihre Liebe zur Komödie eine Gastrolle in Disneys „Bunk'd“ als Kaylie Champion. Sie hat in vielen Filmen wie „Stephanie“, „OG“ und „Miss Virginia“ mitgewirkt.

Im Jahr 2019 erhielt Amanda ihre erste Hauptrolle als Ava in „Black Box“. Sie war begeistert, Teil einer Amazon/Blumhouse-Produktion zu sein.

Amanda ist sehr sportlich und tanzt gerne. Sie spielt als Guard in der Basketballmannschaft ihrer Schule und tanzt mit ihrer Tanzgruppe, wenn es ihr Zeitplan zulässt. Sie liebt es zu reisen und Zeit mit ihrer Familie und ihren Freunden zu verbringen.

data.overview: Ý nghĩa của “The Lobster” có lẽ nằm ở việc miêu tả một xã hội tương lai rất kì lạ nhưng lại rất quen thuộc. Đó là một xã hội mà con người bị đánh giá dựa trên mối quan hệ tình cảm của họ, những định kiến xã hội kì lạ nhưng lại ảnh hưởng đến tất cả. Những cặp đôi thì được thổi phồng thái quá với những quyền lợi như được sống trên du thuyền, được tung hô ngoài xã hội. Còn những kẻ cô đơn thì bị săn đuổi, rẻ mạt, thậm chí bị biến thành mồi săn trong trò chơi của những kẻ khác. Nói cách khác, FA là một tội. Chính vì thế mà các nhân vật trong phim rất áp lực để tìm được nửa kia của mình, thậm chí sẵn sàng tự sát nếu không thành công. Đạo diễn Lanthimos cũng đã chia sẻ trong buổi chiếu phim tại Liên Hoan Phim New York: “Lần này tôi muốn khám phá về mối quan hệ tình cảm, và tại sao người ta lại rất áp lực để thành công trong chuyện đó.”
data.title: Những Người Độc Thân

data.biography: Brenda Currin is an OBIE Award winning actress. Brenda's career began as Nancy Clutter in In Cold Blood. She went on to play Pooh Percy in The World According To Garp with Robin Williams, and appeared in Taps, Reds, and the cult classic C.H.U.D., among others. Brenda worked in the New York theater scene, on and Off Broadway for much of her adult life. She is acclaimed for her two one-person shows based on Eudora Welty's work, Sister and Miss Lexie and A Fire Was In My Head. eudoraweltyonstage.co . In 1990 Brenda left the theater to get a Master's degree in anthropology and then co-founded What Girls Know, a theater program for the healthy development of adolescent girls, which she directed in NYC and other parts of the country for the next 15 years. Since returning to acting, she has worked continually in New York, with concentration on the works of Tennessee Williams, Jane Bowles, Harper Lee, Horton Foote, and a new play, Mr. Toole (Vivian Neuwirth) as Thelma Toole. Brenda's recent film/TV work includes Gossamer Folds, Out Of Blue and Claws. She now resides in New Orleans.
data.name: Brenda Currin
